tasks.name: Add 3 paying Bitcoin HYIP programs with ≥3% daily ROI and ≤$20 minimum deposit to your watchlist
tasks.description: Find HYIP programs that accept Bitcoin, have status 'Paying', offer at least 3% daily ROI, and require a minimum deposit of $20 or less. Add exactly 3 such programs to your personal watchlist. Success is achieved when your watchlist contains 3 programs that meet all these criteria.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled 'HYIP Listings' or similar to open the full program list.
In the payment method filter section, select 'Bitcoin' as the only payment method.
In the status filter section, select 'Paying' so that only currently paying programs are shown.
Locate the ROI filter controls and set the minimum daily ROI to '3%' while leaving the maximum field blank or at its default.
Locate the 'Minimum Deposit' filter and set the maximum allowed minimum deposit to '$20'.
Apply the filters, then use the sort dropdown to select 'Rating: High to Low' (or equivalent) to prioritize better-rated programs.
Starting from the top of the filtered results, open the first 3 program cards in new tabs by clicking on each program title.
On each of the 3 opened program detail pages, click the 'Add to Watchlist' or equivalent button so that all three programs are added to your watchlist.

tasks.name: Bookmark the better-paying HYIP among two programs running 10–60 days based on 30-day total return
tasks.description: Identify two HYIP programs that have been running between 10 and 60 days, are currently paying, and then compare their 30-day total return metric. Bookmark the single program that shows the higher total return over 30 days. Success is achieved when exactly one bookmarked program matches these conditions and has the highest 30-day return among the two.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'HYIP Listings' or 'All Programs' link to open the main list of programs.
Use the status filter to select 'Paying' so only paying programs are displayed.
Find the 'Running Days' or 'Program Age' filter, set the minimum running days to '10' and the maximum to '60', and apply the filter.
Scroll to the results and select the first two distinct programs in the filtered list by clicking each of their titles to open them in separate tabs.
On the first program's detail page, locate the '30-Day Total Return' or equivalent profitability metric shown in the plan or stats section.
On the second program's detail page, locate the same '30-Day Total Return' metric for comparison.
Determine which of the two programs displays the higher numeric value for '30-Day Total Return' and keep that program's tab active.
On the detail page of the program with the higher 30-day total return, click the 'Bookmark', 'Favorite', or equivalent button to save this program as your chosen option.

tasks.name: Post a 4-star review with a 2+ sentence comment on a specific HYIP program discussion
tasks.description: Navigate to the discussion area for a specific HYIP program named 'CryptoMax 300%' and post a structured review. The review must include a 4-star rating and a written comment of at least two sentences describing your simulated experience. Success is achieved when a new review with 4 stars and a multi-sentence comment has been submitted to that program's discussion thread.
steps: From the homepage, click on the search bar in the header.
Type 'CryptoMax 300%' into the search field and press Enter or click the search icon.
In the search results, click on the program titled 'CryptoMax 300%' to open its detail page.
On the program detail page, click on the 'Discussion', 'Reviews', or 'Comments' tab to switch to the community discussion section.
Click the button labeled 'Write a Review', 'Add Comment', or similar to open the review form.
In the star rating control, click the 4th star from the left to assign a 4-star rating to the program.

In the review text field, type a comment of at least two sentences describing a simulated experience, including both one positive point (e.g., fast payouts) and one risk-related concern (e.g., sustainability of the ROI).
Click the 'Submit Review', 'Post Comment', or equivalent button to publish your 4-star review to the discussion thread.

tasks.name: Create a new forum thread announcing a hypothetical HYIP with clearly specified plan details
tasks.description: Create a new topic in the 'New HYIPs' forum category to introduce a hypothetical program called 'AlphaGrowth 5% Daily'. Include its start date, minimum deposit, payment methods, and ROI plan details in the post body. Success is achieved when a new thread with the specified title and structured plan details is posted in the correct category.
steps: From any page, click on the main navigation link labeled 'Forum' or 'Community' to open the forum index.
In the forum index, click on the category named 'New HYIPs', 'New Programs', or the closest equivalent category intended for new listings.
Within the 'New HYIPs' category, click the 'New Thread', 'Post New Topic', or similar button to start creating a new thread.
In the thread title field, enter the text: 'New HYIP: AlphaGrowth 5% Daily'.
If a thread prefix or tag dropdown is available, select a tag such as 'High Risk' or 'New' that best matches a newly launched HYIP.

In the main post body text area, type a structured description including: a start date (e.g., 'Start Date: 15 March 2026'), minimum deposit amount (e.g., 'Minimum Deposit: $10'), payment methods (e.g., 'Payment Methods: Bitcoin, USDT'), and plan details (e.g., 'Plan: 5% daily for 30 days').
Optionally add a short disclaimer line in the body such as 'This is a hypothetical example for discussion purposes only.'
Click the 'Post Thread', 'Create Topic', or equivalent button to publish the new announcement in the 'New HYIPs' category.

tasks.name: Add 2 short-lived high-minimum 'Scam/Not Paying' HYIPs to your personal blacklist and subscribe to scam alerts
tasks.description: Locate HYIP programs labeled as 'Scam' or 'Not Paying' that have a minimum deposit of at least $100 and have been running for fewer than 15 days. Add exactly 2 such programs to your personal blacklist and subscribe to the site's scam alert category. Success is achieved when your blacklist contains 2 programs meeting these criteria and you are subscribed to scam alerts.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Problematic Programs', 'Scam List', or similarly named section in the main navigation.
In the status filter controls, select 'Scam' and 'Not Paying' so that only problematic programs are shown.
Locate the 'Minimum Deposit' filter and set the minimum value to '$100' while leaving the maximum unset or at its default.
Find the 'Running Days' or 'Program Age' filter and set the maximum allowed age to '15' days.
Apply the filters and, from the resulting list, click the titles of the first 2 programs to open each in a new tab.
On the first program's detail page, click the 'Add to Blacklist', 'Avoid', or equivalent button to mark this program on your personal blacklist.
On the second program's detail page, click the same 'Add to Blacklist', 'Avoid', or equivalent button to add it to your blacklist as well.
Return to the 'Problematic Programs' or 'Scam Alerts' section and click the 'Subscribe', 'Follow Category', or similar button to enable notifications for future scam-related posts.

tasks.name: Vote in a community poll for a newly started 5-star paying HYIP launched within the last 7 days
tasks.description: Filter the HYIP listings to find programs that started within the last 7 days, are currently paying, and have a 5/5 user payout rating. For the first such program, open its detail page and cast a vote in its community poll about whether you would consider investing. Success is achieved when your vote is submitted in the poll for a program meeting all these criteria.
steps: From the homepage, navigate to the 'HYIP Listings' or 'All Programs' section.
Use the status filter to select 'Paying'.
Find the 'Start Date' or 'Launched' filter and set the range to show only programs started within the last 7 days.
Locate the user rating filter and set it to show only programs with a payout rating of '5/5' or equivalent maximum score.
Apply the filters and click on the title of the first program in the filtered results to open its detail page.
On the program detail page, scroll to the 'Community Poll', 'User Vote', or similarly labeled poll widget.
In the poll options, select an option such as 'I will not invest', 'Too risky', or the most cautious sentiment available, then click the 'Vote' or 'Submit Vote' button to register your choice.

tasks.name: Configure your dashboard to show only active programs with ≥1.5% daily ROI in USD and enable in-site risk alerts
tasks.description: Adjust your account settings so that your dashboard displays only active HYIP programs with at least 1.5% daily ROI, all values are shown in USD, closed programs are hidden, and in-site notifications are enabled for risk changes on watchlisted programs. Success is achieved when these preferences are saved in your account settings.
steps: Click on your username or profile avatar in the site header to open the account menu.
From the account menu, select 'Settings', 'Preferences', or a similar option, then navigate to the 'Dashboard' or 'Display' settings tab.
In the currency preference dropdown, select 'USD' as the default display currency for all ROI and deposit values.
Locate the 'Minimum Daily ROI to Display' slider or input and set it to '1.5%' so that programs with lower ROI are filtered out on the dashboard.
Find the option labeled 'Show Closed Programs', 'Include Finished', or similar, and uncheck or disable it so closed programs are hidden from your dashboard view.

Switch to the 'Notifications' or 'Alerts' tab within settings, then enable the option for 'In-site notifications when watchlisted programs change status or risk level' by checking the corresponding checkbox or toggle.
Click the 'Save Settings', 'Update Preferences', or equivalent button to apply and store these dashboard and notification preferences.

tasks.name: Send a private message to the latest commenter on a HYIP asking about their payout experience
tasks.description: On a chosen HYIP program discussion, identify the most recent commenter and send them a private message asking about their payout speed and total deposit size. Success is achieved when a private message with a clear subject and a body containing at least two specific questions is sent to that user.
steps: From the homepage, navigate to 'HYIP Listings' and click on any program title that has an active discussion (for example, one with a visible comment count).
On the program detail page, switch to the 'Discussion', 'Comments', or 'Forum' tab to view user comments.
Use the sorting control in the comments section to sort by 'Newest First' so the latest comment appears at the top.
Click on the username of the latest commenter to open that user's profile page.
On the user profile page, click the 'Message', 'Send Private Message', or similar button to start composing a private message.
In the subject field of the message form, type 'Question about your HYIP payout experience'.
In the message body field, type a short message that includes at least two specific questions, such as asking how long their withdrawals take to process and what approximate deposit amount they used.
Click the 'Send Message', 'Submit', or equivalent button to send the private message to the selected user.

entities.name: Program
entities.description: HYIP program listing with core metrics used for filters, rankings, and details.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier

fields.name: is_problematic
fields.description: True if status is scam or not_paying

fields.name: payment_methods
fields.description: Array of payment method enums such as bitcoin, usdt

fields.name: min_deposit_base
fields.description: Minimum deposit in base_currency

fields.name: min_deposit_usd
fields.description: Minimum deposit normalized to USD for filtering

fields.name: daily_roi_percent
fields.description: Typical advertised daily ROI percent (e.g., 3.0 for 3%)

fields.name: total_return_30d_percent
fields.description: Computed 30-day total return percentage used for comparisons

fields.name: running_days
fields.description: Number of days the program has been running

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Program launch date

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: End or closure date if closed

fields.name: payout_rating_value
fields.description: Aggregate payout rating (e.g., 0–5 where 5 represents 5/5)

fields.name: comment_count
fields.description: Number of discussion comments/reviews

fields.name: has_active_poll
fields.description: Whether this program has a community poll

entities.name: ProgramPlan
entities.description: Detailed investment plans associated with a HYIP program.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: References Program.id

fields.name: daily_roi_percent
fields.description: Daily ROI percent for this plan, if applicable

fields.name: duration_days
fields.description: Number of days the plan runs

fields.name: total_return_percent
fields.description: Total return percent over the full plan duration

fields.name: min_deposit
fields.description: Minimum deposit for this plan

fields.name: max_deposit
fields.description: Maximum deposit for this plan, if any

fields.name: principal_returned
fields.description: Whether principal is returned at end

fields.name: description
fields.description: Formatted description (e.g., '5% daily for 30 days')

entities.name: ProgramComment
entities.description: Comments and reviews on a program’s discussion section.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: References Program.id

fields.name: author_profile_id
fields.description: References CommunityProfile.id of the commenter

fields.name: rating_stars
fields.description: Star rating 1–5 if this comment is a review

fields.name: is_review
fields.description: True if structured as a review with rating

entities.name: ProgramPoll
entities.description: Community poll associated with a specific program detail page.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: References Program.id

fields.name: has_user_voted
fields.description: Whether the single local user has already voted

fields.name: user_selected_option_id
fields.description: PollOption.id chosen by the user

entities.name: PollOption
entities.description: Options for a ProgramPoll including aggregate vote counts.

fields.name: poll_id
fields.description: References ProgramPoll.id

entities.name: SavedProgram
entities.description: Single-user saved program record with type: watchlist, bookmark, or blacklist.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: References Program.id

entities.name: AccountSettings
entities.description: Single-user preferences for dashboard display, currency, and notifications.

fields.name: dashboard_min_daily_roi_percent
fields.description: Minimum daily ROI to display on dashboard (e.g., 1.5)

fields.name: dashboard_show_closed_programs
fields.description: If false, hide closed/finished programs from dashboard

fields.name: dashboard_status_filter
fields.description: Array of Program.status enum values to include (e.g., ['paying'])

fields.name: notifications_watchlist_risk_in_site
fields.description: In-site notifications when watchlisted programs change status or risk

fields.name: notifications_scam_alerts_in_site
fields.description: Subscription flag for scam/problematic program alerts

entities.name: ProgramListingFilterState
entities.description: Last-used filter and view state for the HYIP Listings page.

fields.name: status_filter
fields.description: Array of Program.status enum values

fields.name: payment_method_filter
fields.description: Array of payment method enums such as bitcoin, usdt

fields.name: min_min_deposit_usd
fields.description: Minimum allowed min_deposit_usd

fields.name: max_min_deposit_usd
fields.description: Maximum allowed min_deposit_usd

fields.name: min_payout_rating_value
fields.description: Minimum payout rating value (e.g., 5 for 5/5)

entities.name: ForumCategory
entities.description: Top-level forum categories such as New HYIPs or Scam Reports.

entities.name: ForumThread
entities.description: Forum threads within categories, including HYIP announcements.

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: References ForumCategory.id

fields.name: author_profile_id
fields.description: References CommunityProfile.id of the thread starter

fields.name: is_subscribed
fields.description: Whether the local user is subscribed to this thread

entities.name: ForumPost
entities.description: Posts within a forum thread, including the initial announcement and replies.

fields.name: thread_id
fields.description: References ForumThread.id

fields.name: author_profile_id
fields.description: References CommunityProfile.id of the poster

entities.name: CommunityProfile
entities.description: Public profile for other community members (non-local users).

entities.name: PrivateMessage
entities.description: Single-user outbound private messages to other commenters.

fields.name: recipient_profile_id
fields.description: References CommunityProfile.id of the recipient

fields.name: related_program_id
fields.description: Optional Program.id this message refers to

fields.name: related_comment_id
fields.description: Optional ProgramComment.id that prompted the message

entities.name: RiskAlert
entities.description: Alerts about status or risk-level changes for programs, especially those on the watchlist.

fields.name: program_id
fields.description: References Program.id

fields.name: is_for_watchlist_only
fields.description: True if only shown when the program is saved as watchlist/bookmark
